parameters.query: SELECT t.id, t.code, t.email, t.status, t.price_paid, t.tier, t.coupon_code, t.rubric_id, t.draft_paper_id, t.draft_evaluation_id, t.final_paper_id, t.final_evaluation_id, t.expires_at, t.activated_at, t.created_at, r.programme, r.module_name, r.nqf_level, r.assessment_type AS rubric_assessment_type, r.total_marks, r.parsed_json, r.confirmed, r.original_filename FROM tokens t LEFT JOIN rubrics r ON t.rubric_id = r.id WHERE t.code = $1 LIMIT 1;
